title: Let Me See ! [BTW Addon]
description: Modify the camera's movement and allow 3d first person view
body:
# Let Me See ! (BTW:CE Addon)

This addon modify how the camera react when moving, looking around and interacting. It also allow to play in a 3d first person (seeing your player while in 1st person)

This addon is part of the [Dynamic Visuals Series](https://modrinth.com/collection/Lu0zyquD)

## Dependencies

- https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce
- https://modrinth.com/mod/dranimation-lib

## Found a bug or have suggestions ?
https://github.com/BTW-Community/Dynamic-Visuals-Series/issues

## Download
https://modrinth.com/project/let-me-see-!/versions
